Name: Antigravity A1 8K 360 Drone Infinity Bundle
Short description: Shoot 360 without your drone photobombing. Antigravity A1's camera lenses are precisely positioned at the top and bottom of the drone, and an advanced 360 image-stitching algorithm powered by Insta360 makes the drone fully invisible.
Description:
About Antigravity A1 8K 360

The world’s first 360 drone

Built to defy limits and challenge the status quo. Experience full 360 flight and unlock a new dimension of creative freedom. No guardrails. No compromises.

Invisible Drone: 360 Vanishing Act

Shoot 360 without your drone photobombing. Antigravity A1’s camera lenses are precisely positioned at the top and bottom of the drone, and an advanced 360 image-stitching algorithm powered by Insta360 makes the drone fully invisible.

8K 360 Video: Your Full-Sky Memory

Shoot once, explore endlessly. Our 8K 360 drone captures everything around it, letting you relive your footage from all angles in exceptional clarity.

360 Live View: See Flight Differently

Drone pilots can strap into a pair of goggles and experience a truly immersive 360 aerial view, looking freely in any direction with head tracking as if they are there.

Only 249g: Lighten Your Journey

Extraordinary features, minuscule bulk. Discover the world with a mini drone that is both feather-light and regulatory-compliant almost everywhere.

Freemotion Mode: Pure Flight Joy

Discover true freedom with our innovative FreeMotion technology. While camera drones and FPV drones limit your view to the flight path, Antigravity A1 lets you freely explore your surroundings without changing course.

Immersive Flight: Freedom to Explore

The 360 live feed wraps around you – bank left as sunlight splinters through the canyon walls, dive to chase the ridgeline’s edge toward the sea. This isn’t drone piloting. It’s aerial exploration, reimagined.

Intuitive Motion Control: No Piloting Skills? No Problem.

The Grip controller is your magic wand. Point it skyward, and the drone ascends like a shot. Swing it sideways to carve through canyons. It’s a raw kinetic dialogue between your arm and the air.

Limitless Creativity

Reframing: Fly First, Frame Later

Camera drones and FPV drones force you to nail the perfect angle mid-flight. Antigravity A1’s 360 degrees of freedom captures every possible perspective in one take. Missed the shot? Rewind and reframe the footage. No second flights. No wasted battery. Just infinite flexibility.

One Flight, Any Perspective: Shoot Once, Unlock Every Angle

One flight fuels infinite edits. With Antigravity’s 360 capture, you can extract forward, top-down, side or backward views and add dynamic camera movements, all in post-flight.

Export In Any Ratio: Social Media Savvy

Break free from the aspect ratio gridlock. Antigravity A1’s 360 lens captures the full story, so that you can reframe your footage into 16:9 epics or 9:16 reels without compromising quality.

External Display: Unfold The Adventure Together

With Antigravity Vision’s unique external display, your drone’s journey becomes a shared adventure. Watch friends gasp as you dive over cliffs or chase sunsets – now everyone’s part of the thrill.

Flight Safety

Auto Landing Gear

Antigravity A1 automatically extends the landing gear as soon as you power on the drone and retracts after takeoff, ensuring a seamless and worry-free flight.

Smart Safety Features

Antigravity A1 has significantly innovated the flight and obstacle avoidance systems. The Grip controller swiftly directs the drone, ensuring it always flies forward. This way, the forward vision system can handle all obstacles. Additionally, smart features like return-to-home safeguard your flights, letting you fly free without worries.

Compliance: Payload Detection

Antigravity A1 features a payload detection system that flags excess weight to prevent misuse – keeping flight a force for fun and creativity.

Antigravity Care: Backing Every Drone Journey

Whether capturing stunning visuals or exploring new heights, Antigravity Care lets you focus on flying, knowing reliable support is always there.

Key Features

  • Capture breathtaking 8K 360-degree video with the advanced Antigravity A1 drone camera.
  • Experience extended flight time and explore more with three included lithium-ion batteries.
  • Enjoy superior GPS stability for smooth, precise aerial photography and videography.
  • The ultra-light 8.78 oz design ensures portability and no FAA registration is required.
  • Navigate confidently with vision-based obstacle avoidance, enhancing your drone flying safety.
  • Achieve cinematic shots effortlessly using the intuitive remote controller with grip.
